description: Emitted by the UPI/Payments service when a UPI debit fails AFTER the payer's account was debited (money left, beneficiary credit or settlement did not complete). Consumed by Ledger & Settlement to decide and record an auto-reversal.

fields.rrn: NPCI Retrieval Reference Number — the switch-level id; the other idempotency candidate and the key for URCS dedup.
fields.amount_paise: Amount in paise (integer, avoid float money).
fields.payer_vpa: PII — payer UPI handle. Must be covered by the Deny-PII policy in Omnigent.
fields.failure_reason: One of BENEFICIARY_CREDIT_TIMEOUT | SWITCH_DECLINE | DEEMED_APPROVED_TIMEOUT | BENEFICIARY_BANK_DECLINE.
fields.debit_status: SUCCESS means money left the payer — the precondition for a reversal.
fields.credit_status: FAILED/PENDING — if it later flips to SUCCESS (late settlement), do NOT reverse.
fields.settlement_status: UNSETTLED | SETTLED_LATE — the late-settlement race lives here.
fields.tat_deadline: RBI T+1 deadline; auto-reversal must complete by this or ₹100/day is owed to the customer.

_note: Synthetic/fictional data for the SilverOaks Fintech Omnigent demo.
